# Metcalf Search
> Fractional recruiting for small and mid-sized businesses, built around the STACK Method (Source, Tempo, Assess, Close, Keep). Flat monthly fee, pod-structured, single point of contact. Based in Columbus, Ohio.
Metcalf Search is a fractional recruiting firm serving small and mid-sized businesses, typically 10 to 200 employees making a few hires per year. We sit between contingency agencies and full-time internal recruiters as a third option: an embedded recruiting function on a flat monthly subscription, with no per-hire fees. Our work is organized around the STACK Method, a five-letter diagnostic that maps every hiring problem to one of five places: Source, Tempo, Assess, Close, or Keep.
## Method
- [The STACK Method overview](https://metcalfsearch.com/stack-method): The five letters and where each hiring problem lives
- [SOURCE: attracting candidates](https://metcalfsearch.com/source): How small businesses compete for talent
- [TEMPO: engaging candidates](https://metcalfsearch.com/tempo): Process rhythm, ghosting, response time
- [ASSESS: vetting candidates](https://metcalfsearch.com/assess): Structured interviews, scorecards, skill assessment
- [CLOSE: making offers stick](https://metcalfsearch.com/close): Counter-offers, offer acceptance, late-stage drops
- [KEEP: retaining new hires](https://metcalfsearch.com/keep): Onboarding, stay interviews, retention
## Firm
- [Fractional recruiting one-pager](https://metcalfsearch.com/): What it is, why it matters, what to do next
- [Fractional Recruiting](https://metcalfsearch.com/fractional-recruiting): What fractional recruiting is and how the pod model works
- [Services and pricing](https://metcalfsearch.com/services): Four tiers from Careers Pages to Partner Pro, flat monthly fees
- [Who We Serve](https://metcalfsearch.com/who-we-serve): Small business focus, one client per competitive lane
- [About](https://metcalfsearch.com/about): Twenty-five years of recruiting, why this firm exists
- [FAQ](https://metcalfsearch.com/faq): Questions small business owners actually ask
## Resources
- [Blog](https://metcalfsearch.com/blog): Articles on small business hiring
- [For Candidates](https://metcalfsearch.com/candidates): For people who found us through a job
- [Careers Pages](https://careers.metcalfsearch.com/pages/): Hosted careers pages for client companies
